title: The Download: energy transmission and US threats against Chinese AI
summary: Some of that power shuttled in on a 339-mile power line stretching from Quebec to Queens. Plus: OpenAI has unveiled its long-awaited "super app." Plus: New York has become the first state to enact a data center moratorium.
